title: Diagnose runaway cardinality
description: Trace which tag/measurement drives series growth and bound it before the instance degrades.
body: Steps: 1. Query series cardinality per measurement/tag (engine-specific cardinality estimators). 2. Identify the tag with unbounded value count. 3. Confirm it is an identifier wrongly placed in a tag. 4. Move it to a field and re-ingest or stop emitting it. 5. Re-measure cardinality and memory. Rollback point: before schema change to writers. Validation: cardinality flattens and memory stabilizes.
